name.en: Ars Magna of Infinity and Finity
name.ja: <ruby>無<rt>む</rt></ruby><ruby>限<rt>げん</rt></ruby>と<ruby>有<rt>ゆう</rt></ruby><ruby>限<rt>げん</rt></ruby>のアルス＝マグナ

text.en: You can banish this card from your hand; add 1 non-Warrior "Ars Magna" monster from your Deck to your hand, also the original ATK of "Power Patron" Link Monsters you control become tripled for the rest of this turn. If a Fusion and/or Link Monster(s) is Special Summoned while this card is banished (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. If you control a "Power Patron" Link Monster: You can target 1 monster on the field; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Ars Magna of Infinity and Finity" once per turn.
